title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers outlines five production deployment patterns for TypeScript AI agents: streaming tool call events for responsiveness, layered authentication combining API Gateway and IAM, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost budgets and model routing, and observability via metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. The guidance emphasizes moving beyond localhost development to handle real-world requirements like scale, security, and cost control.
